zh.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: 英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick於大約1275年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維時，他的父親Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick47歲，母親Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar37歲。他於1296年與Agnes le Comyn在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1300年在英國蘇格蘭莫雷享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick于大约1275年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維时，他的父亲Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick47岁，母亲Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar37岁。他于1296年与Agnes le Comyn在苏格兰音巴內-爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1300年在英国苏格兰莫雷享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick was born about 1275, in Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick, was 47 and his mother, Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar, was 37. He married Agnes le Comyn in 1296, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1300, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

Il a épousé Agnes le Comyn en 1296, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

ko.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 크롬들일 앤드 인베라런 앤드 아드비
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 크롬들일 앤드 인베라런 앤드 아드비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1296년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Agnes le Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: кромдеил анд инвираллан анд адви, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick родился около 1275 г. в местности кромдеил анд инвираллан анд адви, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes le Comyn в 1296 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
